metadata.title: Generate a governed SR9 orchestration prompt for compliance evidence collection using the failure_lens, targeting EU law firm operations with high-urgency, low-context inputs.

mission.primary_objective: Generate a governed SR9 orchestration prompt for compliance evidence collection using the failure_lens, targeting EU law firm operations with high-urgency, low-context inputs.
mission.success_definition: The generated SR9 orchestration prompt includes all required SRXML sections: <objective>, <scope>, <constraints>, <success_criteria>, <output_contract>.; The prompt defines at least three validation gates (e.g., context validation, constraint validation, acceptance criteria validation).; The prompt specifies how failure_lens is used to detect and remediate missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, and ambiguous acceptance criteria.; The prompt is executable by Codex runtime and produces a compliance evidence artifact that meets EU legal standards.

in_scope.item: The prompt must define a multi-agent workflow (SRX agents) that ingests chaotic, high-urgency, low-context compliance requests, applies failure_lens analysis to detect missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, and ambiguous acceptance criteria, and produces validated compliance evidence artifacts with explicit validation gates.

conflict_resolution.rule: SR8 canonical artifact fields override renderer defaults.
SRXML validation failures force blocked receipt state.

execution_contract.pipeline: raw_intent -> SR8 classification -> canonical artifact -> SRXML draft -> SRXML validation -> receipt

hard_constraints.item: Do not claim final sealed state from RC2 transform output.
Return blocked-state receipt when SR8 readiness is fail or intake is incomplete.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 1
gate.pass_condition: The generated SR9 orchestration prompt includes all required SRXML sections: <objective>, <scope>, <constraints>, <success_criteria>, <output_contract>.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 2
gate.pass_condition: The prompt defines at least three validation gates (e.g., context validation, constraint validation, acceptance criteria validation).

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 3
gate.pass_condition: The prompt specifies how failure_lens is used to detect and remediate missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, and ambiguous acceptance criteria.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 4
gate.pass_condition: The prompt is executable by Codex runtime and produces a compliance evidence artifact that meets EU legal standards.

output_contract.completion_definition: Artifact parses as XML and passes SRXML RC2 static validation.

SRXML_Artifact.orchestration_goal: Generate a governed SR9 orchestration prompt for compliance evidence collection using the failure_lens, targeting EU law firm operations with high-urgency, low-context inputs.

routing_rules.item: Must comply with EU data protection and legal compliance standards (GDPR, ePrivacy, etc.).
Inputs are high-urgency, low-context, and intentionally messy; the workflow must handle missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, and ambiguous acceptance criteria.
All outputs must pass through explicit validation gates before finalization.
The orchestration prompt must be SR8-compilable into Objective, Scope, Constraints, Success Criteria, and Output Contract sections.
The failure_lens must be applied at each stage to flag and resolve ambiguities.

blocked_state.item: Stop, record blocker, and request repair.

SRXML_Artifact.final_report_contract: format: SR9 orchestration prompt in SRXML; required_sections: objective; scope; constraints; success_criteria; output_contract; validation_gates: gate_1_context_validation; gate_2_constraint_validation; gate_3_acceptance_criteria_validation; failure_lens_integration: Each gate uses failure_lens to analyze input for missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, and ambiguous acceptance criteria, and triggers remediation steps before proceeding.; final_artifact: compliance_evidence_document with metadata, validated against EU law firm requirements

validation.minimum_pass_standard: SR8 canonical validation must be recorded and SRXML static validation must pass.

known_failure_modes.item: SR8 artifact classification cannot be represented by SRXML RC2.
SRXML static validation fails after rendering.

failure_handling.fallback_behavior: Return a blocked-state receipt and repair prompt instead of claiming executable success.
failure_handling.blocked_state: No blocked state recorded by SR8 at render time.

receipt.must_record: changed files, commands run, validation result, lineage
